title: GATE-4-FIX-V2 anchor diagnosis
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = "\n"
p = Path('governance/deno_webhook.js')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
needles = ['const curatorComment = `@curator', 'postGitHubComment(pat, curatorComment)', 'TELEGRAM-INBOX', 'governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl', 'POST / — TELEGRAM WEBHOOK']
findings = {n: text.find(n) for n in needles}
state = Path('governance/state/GATE4_FIX_V2_WEBHOOK_ANCHOR_DIAGNOSIS.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4-FIX-V2-DIAG','trace_id':'gate4_fix_v2_webhook_anchor_diagnosis','status':'completed','file_exists':p.exists(),'bytes':len(text.encode('utf-8')),'findings':findings,'snippet_tail':text[-2000:] if text else '', 'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'GATE-4-FIX-V2 patch using detected anchors'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE4_FIX_V2_WEBHOOK_ANCHOR_DIAGNOSIS.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# GATE-4-FIX-V2 | webhook anchor diagnosis' + NL + 'Status: completed' + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + json.dumps(findings, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
